The cargo check step failed after applying translated Go-to-Rust changes.

CHANGE_PLAN_PLACEHOLDER

## Current Rust source
RUST_CODE_PLACEHOLDER

## Compiler errors
ERRORS_PLACEHOLDER

Return ONLY a JSON object mapping relative file paths to their full fixed content.
Example: {"src/main.rs": "fn main() { ... }"}
No markdown, no commentary, no code fences — raw JSON only.
